title: Material Instances Component
description: The material instances for a block. Maps face or material_instance names in a geometry file to an actual material instance.

oneOf.description: A reference to another material instance defined in this map.

material_instance.title: Material Instance
material_instance.description: A material instance definition to map to a material instance in a geometry file.

alpha_masked_tint.description: Is the tint multiplied by the alpha channel of the texture (similar to grass_block's sides). Requires a "tint_method" other than "none" and a "render_method" set to "opaque"

ambient_occlusion.description: If this material has ambient occlusion applied when lighting, shadows will be created around and underneath the block. Decimal value controls exponent applied to a value after lighting.

face_dimming.description: Should this material be dimmed by the direction it's facing?

isotropic.description: Should the faces that this material is applied to randomize their UVs?

oneOf.title: Opaque
oneOf.description: Used for a regular block texture without an alpha layer. Does not allow for transparency or translucency.

oneOf.title: Double Sided
oneOf.description: Used for completely disabling backface culling.

oneOf.title: Blend
oneOf.description: Used for a block like stained glass. Allows for transparency and translucency (slightly transparent textures).

oneOf.title: Alpha Test
oneOf.description: Used for a block like the monster spawner. Does not allow for translucency, only fully opaque or fully transparent textures. Also disabled backface culling.

oneOf.title: Alpha Test (Single Sided)
oneOf.description: Used for a block like the (unstained) glass. Does not allow for translucency, only fully opaque or fully transparent textures. Also enables backface culling.

oneOf.title: Blend to Opaque
oneOf.description: Will blend like stained glass in the near render and turn opaque on the far render.

oneOf.title: Alpha Test to Opaque
oneOf.description: Used for a block like the leaves. Does not allow for translucency, only fully opaque or fully transparent textures in the near render and turn only opaque on the far render. Also disabled backface culling.

oneOf.title: Alpha Test (Single Sided) to Opaque
oneOf.description: Used for a block like the sugar cane. Does not allow for translucency, only fully opaque or fully transparent textures in the near render and turn only opaque on the far render. Also enables backface culling.
